title: Email Preview for Templates with Mapped Column Values

posts.author: wafahu (Wafa Hasnaghina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com Team,

I’d like to request a feature enhancement related to email templates that use mapped column values.

At the moment, there’s no option to preview the email content before sending, especially when it includes dynamic data pulled from columns. This makes it challenging to validate whether the correct information will appear in the final email, and increases the risk of sending inaccurate or incomplete data to external recipients.

I’m requesting a preview feature that would allow me to see the fully rendered email — including all mapped values — before sending. This would help ensure accuracy, boost user confidence, and reduce communication errors.

Thank you for considering this request. I’d appreciate any updates or possible workarounds in the meantime.
